elements.original_description: A stack of small colorful blocks in the center of a white background, with each block slightly offset to show growth upward. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A high-quality 3D render or photograph of a stack of small, vividly colorful blocks, placed centrally on a pure white background. Each block is slightly offset from the one below it, creating a clear visual of upward growth and progression. Professional studio lighting creates soft, clean shadows to enhance the 3D form. High resolution, sharp focus, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks. The mood is optimistic and structured, inspired by the idea of progress.
